title: How can I enable a stacked chart by status grouping each bar
excerpt:
How do bars stacked by status but also grouped by Group? 
Example: 
Group 1 with 3 statuses stacked, Group 2 with 3 statuses stacked etc.

posts.author: PamelaRobinson (Pamela Robinson)
